title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXLIX. Love And Matrimony.
content:
O the little rusty, dusty, rusty miller!
        I'll not change my wife for either gold or siller.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXLIX. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
